summary: Focused validation of iteration 113: restoration of legal compliance docs (Privacy Policy + Terms of Use). Ran 11 pytest cases + Playwright UI walkthrough (login → /privacidade → /termos). All backend and frontend checks pass.

issues: Content is rendered as raw markdown text (visible `#`, `**`, `-` symbols) instead of parsed HTML. Not a regression and NOT authorized to change in this iteration — noting for future iteration if desired.

critical_code_review_comments: COMPLIANCE_DIR fallback (parent → parent.parent) works correctly; files found at /app/backend/compliance/.
/api/compliance/about now reads ENVIRONMENT env var with 'preview' default — returns 'preview' as required.
Compliance endpoints are public (no auth) as designed.
test_credentials: Loaded from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin/pcm/master all valid; ASTEC org id 9a232bf2-fc01-4253-813f-8df356be31c1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 113 focused change: compliance docs relocated to /app/backend/compliance/ and MAINTRIX_ENV replaced by ENVIRONMENT env var. All prior behavior for auth, ativos (55+), OS (100+), storage guard, health, RBAC preserved. LegalDocPage renders content in a <pre>-like block (raw markdown text) via [data-testid=legal-doc-content]; if the product later wants formatted rendering, that's a separate task.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defect found. Restoration successful: GET /api/compliance/privacy returns 4085 chars with all 11 sections; GET /api/compliance/terms returns 3058 chars with all 10 sections; GET /api/compliance/about returns environment='preview'; login flows OK for admin/pcm/master; unauth /api/ativos → 403; unauth /api/storage → 401; /api/ativos → 55+ items; /api/ordens-servico → 100+ items.
